rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Appoint Rick Holbrook As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 28, 2018 in Department 503, Line 1. Plaintiff's motion to appoint Rick Holbrook as successor-in-interest to, and substitute successor-in-interest for deceased plaintiff and for leave to file first amended complaint is denied without prejudice. Mr. Holbrook has not provided documentary evidence in support of his declaration that he is authorized to act on behalf of the beneficiary of Richard Walls's estate (as defined in Section 377.11 of the California Code of Civil Procedure) with respect to the decedent' s interest in the action or proceeding, as required under section 377.11. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:30a.m. A court reporter will not be provided by the court. If any party wishes to have the matter reported, the parties must meet and confer to agree on only one court reporter for any reported matter in this case. There will be only one official record in a case. The designated reporter must be licensed pursuant to Bus. & Prof. Code, Sec. 8016. If the parties are unable to agree on one reporter, the court will designate a qualified court reporter that will provide the official transcript for the matter. The party or parties shall pay for the cost of reporter. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. If a tentative ruling is contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must bring the proposed order to the hearing. If a tentative ruling is not contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must either bring the proposed order to the hearing or submit it after the hearing in compliance with CRC 3.1312. =(503/CML)

rulings.Case Title: STANLEY BOREN VS. GENERAL ELECTRIC COMPANY
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, August 28, 2018 in Department 503, Line 1. Scott Technologies, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment, or, in the alternative, summary adjudication, is off calendar per the request of the moving party. =(503/CML)
